requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — ISC Adopted Standards and EAC Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——ISC采纳标准与EAC协调
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——ISC採納標準與EAC協調

summary.en: ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) is the national standards body and adopts IEC standards as the basis for Cambodia technical standards. IEC 61851-1:2017 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition) addresses DC EV charging stations. EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) as the electricity regulator and project owners in Cambodia expect EV charging equipment to comply with IEC-family safety evidence before accepting installations. Given Cambodia's tropical climate with high ambient temperatures and humidity, IP-rated enclosure protection (IP54 minimum for outdoor chargers) and tropical-grade thermal design are important practical requirements for durable outdoor operation.
summary.zh: ISC（柬埔寨标准研究院）是国家标准机构，采纳IEC标准作为柬埔寨技术标准的基础。IEC 61851-1:2017是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）适用于直流电动汽车充电站。作为电力监管机构的EAC（柬埔寨电力管理局）和柬埔寨项目业主在接受充电桩安装前，通常要求提供IEC体系安全证据。鉴于柬埔寨热带气候的高环境温度和湿度，IP防护等级（室外充电桩至少IP54）和热带级热设计是持久室外运行的重要实际要求。
summary.zht: ISC（柬埔寨標準研究院）是國家標準機構，採納IEC標準作為柬埔寨技術標準的基礎。IEC 61851-1:2017是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）適用於直流電動汽車充電站。作為電力監管機構的EAC（柬埔寨電力管理局）和柬埔寨項目業主在接受充電樁安裝前，通常要求提供IEC體系安全證據。鑑於柬埔寨熱帶氣候的高環境溫度和濕度，IP防護等級（室外充電樁至少IP54）和熱帶級熱設計是持久室外運行的重要實際要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 minimum recommended for outdoor chargers in Cambodia's tropical climate
ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) IEC standard adoption — isc.gov.kh
EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) electricity installation regulatory framework — eac.gov.kh

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence may be useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports expected by ISC-aligned project requirements, EAC-coordinated installations, or international project owners in Cambodia.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代ISC体系项目要求、EAC协调安装或柬埔寨国际项目业主预期的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代ISC體系項目要求、EAC協調安裝或柬埔寨國際項目業主預期的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23:2023 evidence for DC products, IP-rated enclosure certificates (minimum IP54 recommended for outdoor use in Cambodia's humid tropical climate), tropical thermal derating evidence for Cambodia ambient conditions (sustained 35–38 °C, high humidity), protective device ratings, and installation instructions aligned with EAC and EDC requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23:2023证据、IP防护等级认证书（柬埔寨潮湿热带气候室外使用建议至少IP54）、柬埔寨环境条件（持续35–38°C，高湿度）下的热带环境热降额证据、保护器件额定值，以及符合EAC和EDC要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23:2023證據、IP防護等級認證書（柬埔寨潮濕熱帶氣候室外使用建議至少IP54）、柬埔寨環境條件（持續35–38°C，高濕度）下的熱帶環境熱降額證據、保護器件額定值，以及符合EAC和EDC要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — ISC adopts IEC 61851 as the applicable safety framework; EAC-coordinated installations and project owners expect IEC-family compliance evidence; IP54 minimum enclosure protection is a practical requirement for Cambodia's tropical outdoor environment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Cambodia without additional accredited testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Cambodia-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23:2023 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, and a thermal and humidity review for Cambodia's tropical ambient conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向柬埔寨的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23:2023证据、IP防护等级认证书，以及针对柬埔寨热带环境条件的温湿度审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向柬埔寨的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23:2023證據、IP防護等級認證書，以及針對柬埔寨熱帶環境條件的溫濕度審查。
